features.name: Druidic
features.safe_summary: You know Druidic, the secret language of druids. You can speak it and use it to leave hidden messages in nature.
features.rules_summary: You know Druidic, the secret language of druids. You can speak it and use it to leave hidden messages in nature.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.safe_summary: You are a Wisdom-based prepared full caster. Spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Wisdom modifier. Prepare Wisdom modifier + Druid level spells after each Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: You are a Wisdom-based prepared full caster. Spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Wisdom modifier. Prepare Wisdom modifier + Druid level spells after each Long Rest.

features.name: Primal Order
features.safe_summary: Choose Magician or Warden. Magician grants an extra cantrip and adds your Wisdom modifier to Arcana and Nature checks. Warden grants proficiency with Martial weapons and Medium armor.
features.rules_summary: Choose Magician or Warden. Magician grants an extra cantrip and adds your Wisdom modifier to Arcana and Nature checks. Warden grants proficiency with Martial weapons and Medium armor.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.recovery: Regain all uses on a Short or Long Rest.

grants_actions.name: Wild Shape
grants_actions.summary: Expend a use of Wild Shape to magically transform into a Beast you have seen. CR limit starts at 1/4, scaling up as you level.

features.safe_summary: Expend a use of Wild Shape to magically transform into a Beast you have seen. CR limit starts at 1/4, scaling up as you level.
features.rules_summary: Expend a use of Wild Shape to magically transform into a Beast you have seen. CR limit starts at 1/4, scaling up as you level.

features.name: Wild Companion
features.recovery: Uses are tied to Wild Shape recovery (Short or Long Rest).

grants_actions.name: Wild Companion
grants_actions.summary: Expend a Wild Shape use to cast Find Familiar without a spell slot or material components. The familiar lasts until you dismiss it or it drops to 0 HP.

features.safe_summary: Expend a Wild Shape use to cast Find Familiar without a spell slot or material components. The familiar lasts until you dismiss it or it drops to 0 HP.
features.rules_summary: Expend a Wild Shape use to cast Find Familiar without a spell slot or material components. The familiar lasts until you dismiss it or it drops to 0 HP.

features.name: Druid Circle
features.safe_summary: Choose a Druid Circle subclass. Your circle shapes how you use Wild Shape, spells, and primal power. Features at levels 3, 6, 10, and 14.
features.rules_summary: Choose a Druid Circle subclass. Your circle shapes how you use Wild Shape, spells, and primal power. Features at levels 3, 6, 10, and 14.

features.name: Timeless Body
features.safe_summary: You no longer age. You can't be aged magically. You can still die of old age if you reach the end of your natural lifespan.
features.rules_summary: You no longer age. You can't be aged magically. You can still die of old age if you reach the end of your natural lifespan.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.

features.name: Wild Shape Improvement
features.safe_summary: Your Wild Shape CR limit increases to 1/2, and you can now assume beast forms with a swim speed.
features.rules_summary: Your Wild Shape CR limit increases to 1/2, and you can now assume beast forms with a swim speed.

features.name: 3rd-Level Spells
features.safe_summary: At 5th level, you gain access to 3rd-level spell slots.
features.rules_summary: At 5th level, you gain access to 3rd-level spell slots.

features.name: Druid Circle Feature
features.safe_summary: At 6th level, your Druid Circle grants its second feature.
features.rules_summary: At 6th level, your Druid Circle grants its second feature.

features.name: 4th-Level Spells
features.safe_summary: At 7th level, you gain access to 4th-level spell slots.
features.rules_summary: At 7th level, you gain access to 4th-level spell slots.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.

features.name: Wild Shape Improvement
features.safe_summary: Your Wild Shape CR limit increases to 1, and you can now assume beast forms with a fly speed.
features.rules_summary: Your Wild Shape CR limit increases to 1, and you can now assume beast forms with a fly speed.

features.name: 5th-Level Spells
features.safe_summary: At 9th level, you gain access to 5th-level spell slots.
features.rules_summary: At 9th level, you gain access to 5th-level spell slots.

features.name: Druid Circle Feature
features.safe_summary: At 10th level, your Druid Circle grants its third feature.
features.rules_summary: At 10th level, your Druid Circle grants its third feature.

features.name: 6th-Level Spells
features.safe_summary: At 11th level, you gain access to 6th-level spell slots.
features.rules_summary: At 11th level, you gain access to 6th-level spell slots.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.

features.name: 7th-Level Spells
features.safe_summary: At 13th level, you gain access to 7th-level spell slots.
features.rules_summary: At 13th level, you gain access to 7th-level spell slots.

features.name: Druid Circle Feature
features.safe_summary: At 14th level, your Druid Circle grants its final feature.
features.rules_summary: At 14th level, your Druid Circle grants its final feature.

features.name: 8th-Level Spells
features.safe_summary: At 15th level, you gain access to 8th-level spell slots.
features.rules_summary: At 15th level, you gain access to 8th-level spell slots.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each. You can't raise a score above 20 with this feature. You may instead take a Feat.

features.name: 9th-Level Spells
features.safe_summary: At 17th level, you gain access to 9th-level spell slots.
features.rules_summary: At 17th level, you gain access to 9th-level spell slots.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.safe_summary: At 19th level, you gain an Epic Boon feat. The recommended boon for Druids is Boon of Spell Recall.
features.rules_summary: At 19th level, you gain an Epic Boon feat. The recommended boon for Druids is Boon of Spell Recall.

features.name: Druidic
features.safe_summary: You know Druidic, the secret language of druids, which lets you speak, read, and leave hidden messages.
features.rules_summary: You know Druidic, the secret language of druids, which lets you speak, read, and leave hidden messages.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.safe_summary: You are a Wisdom-based prepared full caster. Spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Wisdom modifier. Prepare Wisdom modifier + Druid level spells after each Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: You are a Wisdom-based prepared full caster. Spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Wisdom modifier. Prepare Wisdom modifier + Druid level spells after each Long Rest.

features.name: Primal Order
features.safe_summary: Choose Magician or Warden. Magician grants an extra cantrip and lets you add your Wisdom modifier to Arcana and Nature checks. Warden grants proficiency with Martial weapons and Medium armor.
features.rules_summary: Choose Magician or Warden. Magician grants an extra cantrip and lets you add your Wisdom modifier to Arcana and Nature checks. Warden grants proficiency with Martial weapons and Medium armor.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.recovery: Regain all uses on a Short or Long Rest.

grants_actions.name: Wild Shape
grants_actions.summary: Expend a use of Wild Shape as a Bonus Action to magically transform into a Beast you have seen. You have 2 uses, regained on a Short or Long Rest.

features.safe_summary: Expend a use of Wild Shape as a Bonus Action to magically transform into a Beast you have seen. You have 2 uses, regained on a Short or Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: Expend a use of Wild Shape as a Bonus Action to magically transform into a Beast you have seen. You have 2 uses, regained on a Short or Long Rest.

features.name: Wild Companion
features.recovery: Uses are tied to Wild Shape (recover on Short or Long Rest).

grants_actions.name: Wild Companion
grants_actions.summary: Expend a Wild Shape use to cast Find Familiar without a spell slot or material components. The familiar disappears at your next Long Rest.

features.safe_summary: Expend a Wild Shape use to cast Find Familiar without a spell slot or material components. The familiar disappears at your next Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: Expend a Wild Shape use to cast Find Familiar without a spell slot or material components. The familiar disappears at your next Long Rest.

features.name: Druid Circle
features.safe_summary: At 3rd level, choose a Druid Circle subclass. Your circle grants features at levels 3, 6, 10, and 14.
features.rules_summary: At 3rd level, choose a Druid Circle subclass. Your circle grants features at levels 3, 6, 10, and 14.

features.name: 2nd-Level Spells
features.safe_summary: At 3rd level, you gain access to 2nd-level spell slots.
features.rules_summary: At 3rd level, you gain access to 2nd-level spell slots.

features.name: Cantrips (4 Known)
features.safe_summary: At 4th level, you learn one additional Druid cantrip, bringing your total to 4.
features.rules_summary: At 4th level, you learn one additional Druid cantrip, bringing your total to 4.

features.name: Cantrips (5 Known)
features.safe_summary: At 10th level, you learn one additional Druid cantrip, bringing your total to 5.
features.rules_summary: At 10th level, you learn one additional Druid cantrip, bringing your total to 5.

features.name: Beast Spells
features.safe_summary: At 18th level, you can cast Druid spells while in Wild Shape, performing verbal and somatic components in beast form.
features.rules_summary: At 18th level, you can cast Druid spells while in Wild Shape, performing verbal and somatic components in beast form.

features.name: Archdruid
features.safe_summary: At 20th level, your Wild Shape uses become unlimited, and you can ignore verbal and somatic components of Druid spells while transformed.
features.rules_summary: At 20th level, your Wild Shape uses become unlimited, and you can ignore verbal and somatic components of Druid spells while transformed.
